prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SHM-AFLENCUBH-STD-BLCK Product Type: BADGE_HOLDER Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal Heavy Gauge Leather Law Enforcement (Undercover, Plain Clothes) Neck Chain Universal Badge Holder Description: Made from heavy gauge leather, the ASR Federal black leather universal police badge holder with neck chain was designed specifically for law enforcement shields in off-duty, undercover, or plain clothes situations. Your badge is concealed, but is always close at hand for quick, easy display when required. For use with Oval, Round, and Oblong Shield badges.

Measuring 4" long by 2.5" wide, the black leather universal police badge holder can be worn around neck with the included 30" beaded neck chain lanyard or alternatively, the beaded neck chain lanyard can be easily removed and carried in pocket, work bag or briefcase if not needed. Weighing a feather light 0.8 ounces, the ASR Federal black leather universal police badge holder with neck chain lanyard is comfortable and won't weigh you down. Search Terms: universal badge holder ID police security professional detective CIA FBI undercover plainclothes costume officer leather field operative identification law enforcement department Features: - UNIVERSAL POLICE BADGE HOLDER: The neck chain badge holder is designed to fit all leading styles of police badges and can accommodate a variety of side clip or back pin police badges. - COMPACT DESIGN: The neck chain badge holder features a purposeful low profile, minimal and compact design without any unnecessary bulk, making it easy to wear, carry, and store - HIGH QUALITY LEATHER: Made from heavy gauge genuine leather; weighing only 3 ounces, the leather law enforcement police badge holder is comfortable and easily tucked away with the 30 inch removable beaded neck lanyard - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4 inches L x 2.5 inches W x 0.2 inches H; Weight: 0.8 ounces; Color: Black; Note: 30 inch neck chain lanyard included - NOTE: Police badge NOT included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Federal Black Leather Law Enforcement Badge Holder

openai.item_name: ASR Federal Black Leather Universal Badge Holder

anthropic.title_differentiation: Universal Fit, Heavy Gauge Leather, 30 Inch Neck Chain Included, Compact Design, Undercover And Plainclothes

openai.title_differentiation: Heavy Gauge Genuine Leather, 30 Inch Removable Neck Chain, Fits Oval Round And Oblong Shields, Low Profile, Lightweight
